headerDisplay: Exposes beds published by the [smartbed-mqtt](https://github.com/richardhopton/smartbed-mqtt) Home Assistant add-on to HomeKit. Point this at the *same* MQTT broker the add-on publishes to — it works with every bed type the add-on supports (Sleeptracker, ErgoMotion, Linak, Richmat, Keeson, Octo, and the rest) because it reads the standard Home Assistant MQTT discovery messages the add-on already sends, rather than talking to any single bed protocol itself.
footerDisplay: After saving, restart Homebridge. New beds/entities usually appear within a few seconds of the smartbed-mqtt add-on (re)publishing its discovery messages.

mqttHost.title: MQTT Broker Host
mqttHost.description: The same broker (e.g. the Mosquitto add-on) that smartbed-mqtt is configured to publish to.

mqttUseTls.title: Use TLS (mqtts://)
mqttUseTls.description: Enable if your broker is configured for TLS. Strongly recommended if the broker is reachable outside your local network.

mqttCaFile.title: CA Certificate File Path (optional)
mqttCaFile.description: Only needed for a private/self-signed broker certificate.

mqttCertFile.title: Client Certificate File Path (optional)
mqttCertFile.description: Only needed if your broker requires mutual TLS.

mqttAllowInsecureTls.title: Allow Insecure TLS (skip certificate validation)
mqttAllowInsecureTls.description: ⚠️ Only enable this temporarily against a broker you control. Disabling certificate validation allows traffic to be intercepted or tampered with.

discoveryPrefix.title: MQTT Discovery Prefix
discoveryPrefix.description: Must match the Home Assistant MQTT discovery prefix smartbed-mqtt is using. Leave as default unless you changed it.

includeDevices.title: Only Include Beds Matching (optional)
includeDevices.description: Case-insensitive substrings of bed names to include. Leave empty to include every bed smartbed-mqtt publishes.

excludeDevices.title: Exclude Beds Matching (optional)
excludeDevices.description: Case-insensitive substrings of bed names to hide from HomeKit.

entityNameOverrides.title: Rename Controls (optional)

match.title: Match
match.description: Case-insensitive substring to match against the control's raw name, as published by smartbed-mqtt.

name.title: Display As
name.description: What to show in the Home app instead.

entityNameOverrides.description: Some smartbed-mqtt integrations publish technical/internal names (e.g. a BLE chip's advertised name) instead of something meaningful. Add a rule here to rename any control whose raw name contains a given substring — check Homebridge's debug log (-D) to see the raw names smartbed-mqtt is publishing for your bed. The first matching rule wins; anything that doesn't match keeps its original name.
